title: globularia spinosa
intro: Globularia spinosa, also known as prickly globeflower or rock rose, is a perennial plant species native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Globularia spinosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
